purpose: Machine-readable index of the evidence/reproducibility/quantitative-validity pass layered on the existing REVIEW_PACKAGE (docs 00-20). This pass adds classified, command-level evidence; it does not regenerate the package and renders no investment or production-readiness verdict.

repository.commit_subject: REVIEW_PACKAGE: second-pass Citadel/Two-Sigma-PE hardening — the damning catches

governing_rule: Code existence is not verified behaviour. VERIFIED is reserved for a command/test executed this pass or an exact source line read.
